summary: Iteration 60: Complete testing of CAM (Criteri Ambientali Minimi) module per DM 23/06/2022 n.256. All 7 backend API endpoints tested and working. Frontend CAM section UI fully functional with all required features.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/soglie: PASS - Returns CAM thresholds with normativa, soglie (75%/60%/12%), certificazioni_ammesse
backend_api_tests.POST /api/cam/lotti: PASS - Creates CAM material batch with auto-calculated conformity (conforme_cam, soglia_minima_cam, peso_riciclato_kg)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/lotti: PASS - Lists CAM batches with filter by commessa_id
backend_api_tests.PUT /api/cam/lotti/{lotto_id}: PASS - Updates batch and recalculates conformity
backend_api_tests.POST /api/cam/calcola/{commessa_id}: PASS - Calculates total CAM compliance for commessa, returns peso_totale_kg, peso_riciclato_kg, percentuale_riciclato_totale, conforme_cam, righe
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/calcolo/{commessa_id}: PASS - Returns latest CAM calculation from DB
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/dichiarazione-pdf/{commessa: PASS - Generates valid PDF file (17KB, starts with %PDF)

frontend_ui_tests.cam_section_visibility: PASS - CAM section visible in CommessaOpsPanel with Leaf icon and 'CAM - Criteri Ambientali Minimi' header
frontend_ui_tests.cam_summary_card: PASS - Shows CONFORME/NON CONFORME status with green/red colors, DM 256/2022 badge, Peso Totale, Peso Riciclato, % Riciclato, Soglia Min.
frontend_ui_tests.aggiungi_materiale_button: PASS - data-testid='btn-new-cam-lotto' present and opens dialog
frontend_ui_tests.add_material_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with all CAM fields: Descrizione, Qualità acciaio, Fornitore, N. Colata, Peso (kg), % Riciclato, Metodo produttivo dropdown, Certificazione dropdown, N. Certificazione, Ente certificatore, Uso strutturale checkbox
frontend_ui_tests.dialog_fields_data_testid: PASS - cam-descrizione, cam-peso, cam-perc-riciclato, cam-metodo all present
frontend_ui_tests.pdf_download_button: PASS - data-testid='btn-cam-pdf' present and triggers PDF download

critical_code_review_comments: CAM module implementation is complete and follows DM 23/06/2022 n.256 requirements
Backend routes properly registered in main.py (line 38, 99)
PDF generation uses WeasyPrint with professional formatting
Frontend uses correct data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Conformity calculation logic correctly handles all three metodo_produttivo types with appropriate thresholds
test_credentials: Created test session test_cam_session_1772307497726, test commessa com_788c1c78262c - both cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Test CAM lotto lot_2cbe809ee0 created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: CAM module fully functional. Key endpoints: /api/cam/soglie (public), /api/cam/lotti (CRUD), /api/cam/calcola/{commessa_id}, /api/cam/calcolo/{commessa_id}, /api/cam/dichiarazione-pdf/{commessa_id}. Frontend CAM section is inside CommessaOpsPanel, accessed via /commesse/{commessa_id} route. All data-testid attributes documented in review_request.
